children.label: isInitialized
description: Check if the change tracking service is initialized.
returnComment: true if the change tracking service is initialized.

children.label: initialize
description: Initialize the change tracking service.

children.label: elasticsearchClient
description: The privileged elasticsearch client `core.elasticsearch.client.asInternalUser`.

returnComment: A promise that resolves when the change tracking service is initialized.

children.label: log
description: Log a change for a single object.

children.label: change
description: - The changes to object that was affected.

children.label: opts
description: - The options for the change.

returnComment: A promise that resolves when the change is logged.

children.label: logBulk
description: Log a bulk change for one or more objects.

children.label: changes
description: - The changes to objects that were affected.

children.label: opts
description: - The options for the bulk change.

returnComment: A promise that resolves when the bulk change is logged.

children.label: getHistory
description: Get the change history of an object.
signature: (spaceId: string, objectType: string, objectId: string, opts?:

children.label: spaceId
description: - The kibana space Id where this object exists

children.label: objectType
description: - The type of the object.

children.label: objectId
description: - The ID of the object.

children.label: opts
description: - The options for the history query.

interfaces.label: ChangeHistoryDiff
description: Output of the diff calculation

children.label: stats
signature: { total: number; additions: number; deletions: number; updates: number; }

children.label: type
description: The type of diff calculation (ie `default`, `rfc6902` etc)

children.label: fields
description: The list of fields that changed, using full paths

children.label: ignored
description: The list of fields that were ignored, using full paths

children.label: before
description: A partial copy of the original object, including only fields that changed

children.label: after
description: A partial copy of the modified object, including only fields that changed

interfaces.label: ChangeHistoryDiffOptions
description: Input for the diff calculation

interfaces.label: ChangeHistoryDocument
description: Represents a single document in the change history.

children.label: '@timestamp'
description: ISO8601 timestamp when the target object was changed (successful write confirmed).

children.label: event
signature: { id: string; module: string; dataset: string; action: string; type: "deletion" | "creation" | "change"; reason?: string | undefined; created?: string | undefined; }

children.label: object
signature: { id: string; type: string; index?: string | undefined; hash: string; sequence?: number | undefined; diff?: { type: "default"; fields: string[]; before: Record<string, unknown>; } | undefined; fields: { hashed: string[]; }; snapshot: Record<string, unknown>; }

children.label: tags
description: Optional list of tags for the event.

children.label: metadata
description: Optional metadata about the event. Information that does not form part of the diff or ECS schema.

interfaces.label: ChangeHistoryFieldsToHash
description: Fields hashed due to sensitive nature (PII, Secret keys, etc) or being very large (base64 blob)

interfaces.label: ChangeHistoryFieldsToIgnore
description: Fields excluded from diff calculation

interfaces.label: GetHistoryResult
description: Result from a history query.

children.label: getHistory
signature: (spaceId: string, objectType: string, objectId: string, opts?:

children.label: action
description: Action performed by the user (`rule_create`, `rule_update`, `rule_delete`, etc.). Some Audit log examples (@see https://www.elastic.co/docs/reference/kibana/kibana-audit-events#xpack-security-ecs-audit-logging)

children.label: username
description: Current login name for user that generated the change.

children.label: userProfileId
description: Unique profile identifier used by auth realm (@see https://www.elastic.co/docs/deploy-manage/users-roles/cluster-or-deployment-auth/user-profiles)

children.label: spaceId
description: Kibana space that the event belongs to. (ie `default` etc).

children.label: correlationId
description: ID shared between events that take place together (ie in the same transaction).

children.label: data
description:
Direct overrides for the change document (`tags`, `metadata`, and selected `event` fields).
`event.id` is always generated by the client and cannot be supplied here.

children.label: fieldsToIgnore
description: List of fields to ignore in change calculation

children.label: fieldsToHash
description: List of fields to hash in the saved change history (secret keys, PII, base64 etc)

children.label: refresh
description: Optional indicator to force an ES refresh after changes (affects performance)

children.label: timestamp
description: ISO8601 `@timestamp` when this change was confirmed.

children.label: objectType
description: The `object.type`. Allows multiple object types per data stream.

children.label: objectId
description: The `object.id`. Uniquely identifies this object in Kibana within its `type`

children.label: index
description: ES backing `_index` where this object was stored.

children.label: sequence
description: A sequentially increasing version for ordering changes. Please avoid ES _seq_no or _version as these are not reliable

children.label: before
description: Raw version of the object. Before changes. If available.

children.label: after
description: Raw copy of the object after changes (ie the `object.snapshot`).

misc.label: DATA_STREAM_NAME
description: Name of the datastream in elasticsearch
